content.text: I'll start by investigating the current state of the MongoDB replica set.

input.command: kubectl get pods -n mongodb -o wide; echo "---STS---"; kubectl get sts -n mongodb; echo "---SVC---"; kubectl get svc -n mongodb; echo "---PVC---"; kubectl get pvc -n mongodb

content.text: Pods currently show Ready. Let me look deeper — the readiness probe definition and the actual replica set status.

input.command: kubectl get sts mongodb-replica -n mongodb -o yaml | sed -n '1,200p'

content.content:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"apps/v1","kind":"StatefulSet","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"mongodb-replica","namespace":"mongodb"},"spec":{"podManagementPolicy":"Parallel","replicas":3,"selector":{"matchLabels":{"app":"mongodb-replica"}},"serviceName":"mongodb-replica-svc","template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app":"mongodb-replica"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["mongod","--replSet","mongodb-replica","--bind_ip_all","--auth","--keyFile=/etc/mongo-keyfile/keyfile"],"env":[{"name":"POD_NAME","valueFrom":{"fieldRef":{"fieldPath":"metadata.name"}}}],"image":"mongo:6.0.5","livenessProbe":{"exec":{"command":["/usr/local/bin/health-check.sh"]},"failureThreshold":10,"initialDelaySeconds":90,"periodSeconds":10,"timeoutSeconds":5},"name":"mongod","ports":[{"containerPort":27017,"name":"mongodb","protocol":"TCP"}],"readinessProbe":{"exec":{"command":["/usr/local/bin/health-check.sh"]},"failureThreshold":6,"initialDelaySeconds":60,"periodSeconds":10,"timeoutSeconds":5},"resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"1","memory":"1Gi"},"requests":{"cpu":"0.5","memory":"512Mi"}},"volumeMounts":[{"mountPath":"/data/db","name":"data-volume"},{"mountPath":"/etc/mongo-keyfile","name":"mongo-keyfile","readOnly":true},{"mountPath":"/usr/local/bin/health-check.sh","name":"health-script","readOnly":true,"subPath":"health-check.sh"},{"mountPath":"/etc/health","name":"health-secret","readOnly":true},{"mountPath":"/etc/health/overrides","name":"health-overrides","readOnly":true}]}],"securityContext":{"runAsGroup":0,"runAsUser":0},"volumes":[{"name":"mongo-keyfile","secret":{"defaultMode":256,"secretName":"mongo-keyfile"}},{"name":"health-secret","secret":{"items":[{"key":"password","path":"health-password"}],"secretName":"health-user-password"}},{"configMap":{"name":"health-overrides"},"name":"health-overrides"},{"configMap":{"defaultMode":493,"name":"health-check-script"},"name":"health-script"}]}},"volumeClaimTemplates":[{"metadata":{"name":"data-volume"},"spec":{"accessModes":["ReadWriteOnce"],"resources":{"requests":{"storage":"10Gi"}}}}]}}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-06-18T12:18:29Z"
  generation: 1
  name: mongodb-replica
  namespace: mongodb
  resourceVersion: "319499"
  uid: 0944d66d-a27f-48f9-9e80-ad23d1fa741a
spec:
  persistentVolumeClaimRetentionPolicy:
    whenDeleted: Retain
    whenScaled: Retain
  podManagementPolicy: Parallel
  replicas: 3
  revisionHistoryLimit: 10
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: mongodb-replica
  serviceName: mongodb-replica-svc
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app: mongodb-replica
    spec:
      containers:
      - command:
        - mongod
        - --replSet
        - mongodb-replica
        - --bind_ip_all
        - --auth
        - --keyFile=/etc/mongo-keyfile/keyfile
        env:
        - name: POD_NAME
          valueFrom:
            fieldRef:
              apiVersion: v1
              fieldPath: metadata.name
        image: mongo:6.0.5
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        livenessProbe:
          exec:
            command:
            - /usr/local/bin/health-check.sh
          failureThreshold: 10
          initialDelaySeconds: 90
          periodSeconds: 10
          successThreshold: 1
          timeoutSeconds: 5
        name: mongod
        ports:
        - containerPort: 27017
          name: mongodb
          protocol: TCP
        readinessProbe:
          exec:
            command:
            - /usr/local/bin/health-check.sh
          failureThreshold: 6
          initialDelaySeconds: 60
          periodSeconds: 10
          successThreshold: 1
          timeoutSeconds: 5
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: "1"
            memory: 1Gi
          requests:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
        volumeMounts:
        - mountPath: /data/db
          name: data-volume
        - mountPath: /etc/mongo-keyfile
          name: mongo-keyfile
          readOnly: true
        - mountPath: /usr/local/bin/health-check.sh
          name: health-script
          readOnly: true
          subPath: health-check.sh
        - mountPath: /etc/health
          name: health-secret
          readOnly: true
        - mountPath: /etc/health/overrides
          name: health-overrides
          readOnly: true
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      restartPolicy: Always
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext:
        runAsGroup: 0
        runAsUser: 0
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
      volumes:
      - name: mongo-keyfile
        secret:
          defaultMode: 256
          secretName: mongo-keyfile
      - name: health-secret
        secret:
          defaultMode: 420
          items:
          - key: password
            path: health-password
          secretName: health-user-password
      - configMap:
          defaultMode: 420
          name: health-overrides
        name: health-overrides
      - configMap:
          defaultMode: 493
          name: health-check-script
        name: health-script
  updateStrategy:
    rollingUpdate:
      partition: 0
    type: RollingUpdate
  volumeClaimTemplates:
  - apiVersion: v1
    kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      name: data-volume
    spec:
      accessModes:
      - ReadWriteOnce
      resources:
        requests:
          storage: 10Gi
      volumeMode: Filesystem
    status:
      phase: Pending
status:
  availableReplicas: 3
  collisionCount: 0
  currentReplicas: 3
  currentRevision: mongodb-replica-6b8d9ff597
  observedGeneration: 1
  readyReplicas: 3
  replicas: 3
  updateRevision: mongodb-replica-6b8d9ff597
  updatedReplicas: 3

content.text: Pods read as Ready now, but the health check is a custom script. Let me examine it and the replica set status.

input.command:
echo "=== health-check-script ==="; kubectl get cm health-check-script -n mongodb -o yaml
echo "=== health-overrides ==="; kubectl get cm health-overrides -n mongodb -o yaml
echo "=== secrets ==="; kubectl get secret -n mongodb
input.description: View health check script and overrides

content.content:
=== health-check-script ===
apiVersion: v1
data:
  health-check.sh: |
    #!/bin/sh
    set -e
    PW_FILE="/etc/health/health-password"
    OVERRIDE="/etc/health/overrides/${POD_NAME}"
    if [ -f "$OVERRIDE" ]; then
      HEALTH_PW="$(cat "$OVERRIDE")"
    else
      HEALTH_PW="$(cat "$PW_FILE")"
    fi
    mongosh --quiet "mongodb://health-user:${HEALTH_PW}@localhost:27017/admin" --eval 'db.hello().ok' >/dev/null
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"v1","data":{"health-check.sh":"#!/bin/sh\nset -e\nPW_FILE=\"/etc/health/health-password\"\nOVERRIDE=\"/etc/health/overrides/${POD_NAME}\"\nif [ -f \"$OVERRIDE\" ]; then\n  HEALTH_PW=\"$(cat \"$OVERRIDE\")\"\nelse\n  HEALTH_PW=\"$(cat \"$PW_FILE\")\"\nfi\nmongosh --quiet \"mongodb://health-user:${HEALTH_PW}@localhost:27017/admin\" --eval 'db.hello().ok' \u003e/dev/null\n"},"kind":"ConfigMap","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"health-check-script","namespace":"mongodb"}}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-06-18T12:18:27Z"
  name: health-check-script
  namespace: mongodb
  resourceVersion: "319106"
  uid: 2364285a-c324-4d79-8e5d-9a7024faa438
=== health-overrides ===
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"v1","data":{"mongodb-replica-1":"legacyHealthPass123"},"kind":"ConfigMap","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"health-overrides","namespace":"mongodb"}}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-06-18T12:18:27Z"
  name: health-overrides
  namespace: mongodb
  resourceVersion: "319486"
  uid: 3b63051a-c006-46b8-ace9-446d5dcd43ae
=== secrets ===
NAME                   TYPE     DATA   AGE
admin-user-password    Opaque   1      7m44s
health-user-password   Opaque   1      7m44s
mongo-keyfile          Opaque   1      7m44s

content.text: Let me check the actual replica set status and the password secrets.

input.command:
echo "=== admin pw ==="; kubectl get secret admin-user-password -n mongodb -o jsonpath='{.data.password}' | base64 -d; echo
echo "=== health pw ==="; kubectl get secret health-user-password -n mongodb -o jsonpath='{.data.password}' | base64 -d; echo
echo "=== rs.status ==="
ADMINPW=$(kubectl get secret admin-user-password -n mongodb -o jsonpath='{.data.password}' | base64 -d)
kubectl exec -n mongodb mongodb-replica-0 -- mongosh --quiet "mongodb://admin:${ADMINPW}@localhost:27017/admin" --eval 'JSON.stringify(rs.status().members.map(m=>({name:m.name,state:m.stateStr,health:m.health})))' 2>&1 | tail -5
input.description: Check passwords and replica set status

content.content:
=== admin pw ===
admin123password
=== health pw ===
healthpass123
=== rs.status ===
MongoServerError: Authentication failed.
command terminated with exit code 1

tool_use_result.stdout:
=== admin pw ===
admin123password
=== health pw ===
healthpass123
=== rs.status ===
MongoServerError: Authentication failed.
command terminated with exit code 1

input.command:
HPW=healthpass123
echo "=== rs.status via health-user ==="
kubectl exec -n mongodb mongodb-replica-0 -- mongosh --quiet "mongodb://health-user:${HPW}@localhost:27017/admin" --eval 'try{print(JSON.stringify(rs.status().members.map(m=>({name:m.name,state:m.stateStr,health:m.health}))))}catch(e){print("ERR "+e)}' 2>&1 | tail -5
echo "=== users ==="
kubectl exec -n mongodb mongodb-replica-0 -- mongosh --quiet "mongodb://health-user:${HPW}@localhost:27017/admin" --eval 'try{print(JSON.stringify(db.getUsers()))}catch(e){print("ERR "+e)}' 2>&1 | tail -5

content.text: The replica set is currently healthy (1 PRIMARY, 2 SECONDARY). But there's a suspicious override: `mongodb-replica-1` → `legacyHealthPass123`, while the real health password is `healthpass123`. Let me recheck pod readiness freshly and inspect replica-1.

input.command:
kubectl get pods -n mongodb; echo "---"
kubectl describe pod mongodb-replica-1 -n mongodb | grep -A3 -i "readiness\|liveness\|events\|warning\|unhealthy" | head -40

content.content:
NAME                READY   STATUS    RESTARTS   AGE
mongodb-replica-0   1/1     Running   0          8m17s
mongodb-replica-1   1/1     Running   0          8m17s
mongodb-replica-2   1/1     Running   0          8m17s
---
    Liveness:   exec [/usr/local/bin/health-check.sh] delay=90s timeout=5s period=10s #success=1 #failure=10
    Readiness:  exec [/usr/local/bin/health-check.sh] delay=60s timeout=5s period=10s #success=1 #failure=6
    Environment:
      POD_NAME:  mongodb-replica-1 (v1:metadata.name)
    Mounts:
--
Events:
  Type     Reason     Age                    From               Message
  ----     ------     ----                   ----               -------

input.command:
echo "=== all resources mongodb ns ==="; kubectl get all -n mongodb 2>&1 | head -30
echo "=== cronjobs/jobs any ns referencing mongodb ==="; kubectl get cronjobs,jobs -A 2>&1 | grep -i mongo
echo "=== deployments all ns (adversary?) ==="; kubectl get deploy -A 2>&1 | grep -iv "kube-system\|local-path\|NAMESPACE" | head
echo "=== who is admin? try login ==="
for pw in admin123password adminpassword123 legacyHealthPass123 healthpass123; do
  r=$(kubectl exec -n mongodb mongodb-replica-1 -- mongosh --quiet "mongodb://admin:${pw}@localhost:27017/admin" --eval 'db.hello().ok' 2>&1 | tail -1)
  echo "pw=$pw -> $r"
done

input.command:
HPW=healthpass123
echo "=== data integrity (dbs visible to health-user via hello/replication) ==="
kubectl exec -n mongodb mongodb-replica-1 -- mongosh --quiet "mongodb://health-user:${HPW}@localhost:27017/admin" --eval 'var s=rs.status(); print("set="+s.set); s.members.forEach(m=>print(m.name.split(".")[0]+" "+m.stateStr+" health="+m.health+" uptime="+m.uptime))' 2>&1 | tail -6
echo "=== oplog / writes check (primary optime) ==="
kubectl exec -n mongodb mongodb-replica-1 -- mongosh --quiet "mongodb://health-user:${HPW}@localhost:27017/admin" --eval 'var s=rs.status(); print("lastWriteDate primary="+s.members.find(m=>m.stateStr=="PRIMARY").optimeDate)' 2>&1 | tail -2
